description:
Fetch the crystal structure of E. coli Dihydrofolate Reductase (DHFR) complexed with methotrexate (PDB ID: 1RX2) and its corresponding 2Fo-Fc electron density map. Generate an electron density mesh (isomesh) contoured at 1.5 sigma, carved specifically to a 2.0 Å radius around the methotrexate ligand (residue name MTX).

Create a publication-quality visualization showing the MTX ligand as sticks within this localized density mesh. Hide any unnecessary solvent or global uncarved density so the focus is purely on the ligand and its binding pocket density. Render and save the figure to ~/PyMOL_Data/images/mtx_density.png.

Finally, write a summary report to ~/PyMOL_Data/density_report.txt containing the PDB ID (1RX2), the ligand 3-letter code, the map type used, and the contour level (1.5).
